title: Poikilospermum subscaber
taxonomy: Poikilospermum subscaber is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Poikilospermum, which is a group of plants that are native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The plant is a type of shrub or vine, and its classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships. Poikilospermum subscaber is a part of the larger clade of plants known as Angiosperms, which are flowering plants that produce seeds. Its classification also falls under the broader category of Angiospermophyta, which includes all flowering plants.
